textByHashes.2288555534e7c9f66e3cef29fc34a7547d89f8a5: No. General Khazard has ordered us to guard this door. I'm not about to just let you walk through it.
textByHashes.4e739e161efd812de1f7482db480ba1d621c6701: I don't have time to answer your questions. I've told you that you can't go in, so go away.
textByHashes.f3f368fe863afa92212d1018d0ac33fd812cf13f: Fine. If it stops you bothering me, feel free to go and get yourself killed.
textByHashes.ebfe60b900a454a5a8969fc031be9121708b3996: Adventurer. The General warned us about you.
textByHashes.4f1364ca0519dce2693b4b7a157d83d8254edb53: Yes. He said you might show up here again. We're not to harm you, but make no mistake, we're keeping a close eye on you. You're not to be trusted.
textByHashes.d23bd8ca36b3aa93ab166ce454c6a06bdee390ff: We are not here to make small talk. Leave us to our work.
textByHashes.17c063e2ec6448aad33311bc83b46f8493447382: You again? As I told you before, we are not here to make small talk. Leave us to our work.
textByHashes.f470214ae88c6ebb7ab8b54b2cf81330a969cb7e: I already told you to stop bothering us. Please go away.
